description: Complete knowledge base for BBMP roads and sanitation department - used for RAG-based grievance resolution

policies.rule: Pothole repair must begin within 7 days on main roads
Temporary road patching required within 24 hours for accident-prone areas
Street light repair within 48 hours of complaint
Daily garbage collection mandatory in all residential areas
Missed garbage collection complaint resolved within 24 hours
Bulk waste removal within 48 hours of request
Public toilet cleaning minimum twice daily
Illegal dumping complaints acted upon within 12 hours
Storm drain cleaning mandatory before monsoon season
Road cave-in or sinkhole treated as emergency within 4 hours

contact_info.sahaaya_app: BBMP Sahaaya mobile app for faster complaints

common_grievances.resolution: Report to BBMP helpline 1533 with exact location and photos. Temporary patching within 24 hours for accident-prone roads. Permanent repair within 7 days.
Call 1533 immediately. This is an emergency. Barricading within 4 hours. Repair within 48 hours.
Report to BBMP helpline 1533 with street name and location. Repair within 48 hours. Use BBMP Sahaaya app for faster response.
Call 1533 or BBMP Sahaaya app. Specify ward number and area. Immediate pickup arranged. Resolved within 24 hours.
Report to BBMP with location. Action taken within 12 hours. Fine imposed on defaulters. Area cleaned within 24 hours.
Call 1533. Drain cleaning within 48 hours. Emergency cleaning for overflow within 12 hours.
File complaint at ward office or online. Survey within 7 days. Action taken within 15 days.

online_services.sahaaya_app: Available on Play Store and App Store

faq.question: How do I report a pothole?
faq.answer: Call BBMP helpline 1533 or use the BBMP Sahaaya app. Share exact location and photos. Temporary patching within 24 hours for dangerous potholes.

faq.question: Garbage has not been collected for 2 days. What to do?
faq.answer: Call 1533 or use BBMP Sahaaya app. Provide ward number and area name. Immediate pickup arranged within 24 hours.

faq.question: Street light is not working near my house. How to report?
faq.answer: Call BBMP helpline 1533 with street name and nearest landmark. Repair within 48 hours. You can also use BBMP Sahaaya app.

faq.question: There is a road cave-in. Is it an emergency?
faq.answer: Yes, road cave-in is a critical emergency. Call 1533 immediately. Barricading done within 4 hours. Do not drive or walk near the affected area.
